title: What Actually Changed In Claude Opus 4.8

content.text: Claude Opus 4.8 just dropped last night
and this might be the upgrade that
finally wins people back. When the last
model came out, a lot of people refused
to upgrade. Business owners, knowledge
workers, copywriters, plenty of them
stayed on the older Opus 4.6 version
because 4.7 felt a bit off and their
skills and workflows didn't work as well
as they were used to. But with Opus 4.8,
that feeling is gone. It's hard to
describe, but the writing's more
natural. The ads it builds feel more
human. The taste is just nicer for the
